parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The full git ref that was pushed. Example: refs/heads/main or refs/tags/v3.14.1.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref before the push.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref after the push.

parameters.name: created
parameters.description: Whether this push created the ref.

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description: Whether this push deleted the ref.

parameters.name: forced
parameters.description: Whether this push was a force push of the ref.

parameters.name: base_ref
parameters.description: No description provided in source (string or null).

parameters.name: compare
parameters.description: URL that shows the changes in this ref update, from before to after commit.

parameters.name: commits
parameters.description: An array of commit objects describing the pushed commits.

parameters.name: head_commit
parameters.description: No description provided in source (object or null).

parameters.name: repository
parameters.description: The repository that was pushed to.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The user that pushed the commits.

request.description: push event payload (JSON request body of the webhook delivery).

responses.description: Receiver must respond with HTTP 200 within 10 seconds. A non-200 response or a response slower than 10 seconds is recorded as a failed delivery; GitHub does not automatically redeliver.

missing: No full example payload body is provided in the source for this event; object-typed properties (repository, sender, hook, commits) are not expanded.
